name: b/d chicken flavor dry dog food
description: as dogs age, many may start to show age-related behaviors, such as house soiling, disrupted sleep patterns, loss of memory and reduced social interaction. improving these aging behaviors can be as easy as feeding the right nutrition early on and consistently. high levels of omega-3 fatty acids to support brain health appropriate levels of protein, phosphorus & sodium clinically proven antioxidants plus added fruits & vegetables
